options.content: {{{@root.NOME}}}
options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT a.NOME
FROM CLIENTE as a
join ENDERECO_LOGIN as b ON b.COD_CLIENTE = a.COD_CLIENTE
WHERE b.LOGIN = '$login'

options.defaultContent: 💬 Falar no WhatsApp
options.styles:
<style>
    * {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    body {
      font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      min-height: 100vh;
      background: transparent;
      padding: 20px;
    }
    
    @keyframes fadeIn {
      from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(10px);
      }
      to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
      }
    }

    .whatsapp-button {
      display: inline-block;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #25D366 0%, #20B658 100%);
      color: white;
      padding: 16px 36px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      text-decoration: none;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 24px;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(37, 211, 102, 0.4), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
      position: relative;
      animation: fadeIn 0.6s ease-out;
      border: 1px solid rgba(32, 182, 88, 0.5);
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    }

    .whatsapp-button:hover {
      transform: translateY(-4px);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(37, 211, 102, 0.5), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #20B658 0%, #1DA851 100%);
    }

    .whatsapp-button:active {
      transform: translateY(0);
      box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(37, 211, 102, 0.3);
    }

    .whatsapp-button span {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      display: inline-block;
    }

    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      .whatsapp-button {
        padding: 12px 28px;
        font-size: 14px;
      }
    }
  </style>

options.defaultContent: 🔍 Looking Glass
options.styles:
<style>
    * {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    body {
      font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      min-height: 100vh;
      background: transparent;
      padding: 20px;
    }
    
    @keyframes fadeIn {
      from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(10px);
      }
      to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
      }
    }

    .looking-glass-button {
      display: inline-block;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3B82F6 0%, #8B5CF6 100%);
      color: white;
      padding: 16px 36px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      text-decoration: none;
      font-weight: 1000;
      font-size: 30px;
      letter-spacing: 3.5px;
      transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.4), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
      position: center;
      animation: fadeIn 0.6s ease-out;
      border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.5);
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    }

    .looking-glass-button:hover {
      transform: translateY(-4px);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.5), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8B5CF6 0%, #3B82F6 100%);
    }

    .looking-glass-button:active {
      transform: translateY(0);
      box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3);
    }

    .looking-glass-button span {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      display: inline-block;
    }

    @media (max-width: 520px) {
      .looking-glass-button {
        padding: 12px 28px;
        font-size: 18px;
      }
    }
  </style>

options.content:
ATIVO
PLANO DE INTERNET
{{{@root.plano}}}
Velocidade de Conexão
options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
    COALESCE(pla.NOME, 'N/A') AS plano_original,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(
        pla.NOME,
        '.*?(\\d+)(?:_?\\s*)([A-Za-z]+).*',
        '\\1 \\2'
    ) AS plano
FROM PROVEDOR_GERAL prov
LEFT JOIN PLANOS pla 
       ON pla.COD_PLANO = prov.COD_PLANO
WHERE prov.LOGIN = '$login';

options.content:
{{{@root.Status}}}
{{{ @root.Status}}}
options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.rawSql:
select 
CASE when AcctStopTime is null 
    then 'Online'
      else 'Offline'
END AS 'Status'
  
FROM ALTAREDE.radacct
where UserName ='$login'
ORDER BY RadAcctId desc
limit 1

options.content:
{{{ @root.tempo_conectado}}}
TEMPO DE ATIVIDADE
options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.rawSql:
select 

CASE 
  WHEN AcctStartTime IS NOT NULL THEN 
    CONCAT(
      FLOOR(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, AcctStartTime, NOW()) / 86400), 'd ',
      LPAD(FLOOR((TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, AcctStartTime, NOW()) % 86400) / 3600), 2, '0'), 'h ',
      LPAD(FLOOR((TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, AcctStartTime, NOW()) % 3600) / 60), 2, '0'), 'm'
    )
  ELSE '-\\-'
END AS tempo_conectado


FROM ALTAREDE.radacct
where UserName ='$login'
ORDER BY RadAcctId desc
limit 1

targets.rawSql:
select 
  UserName as Login

FROM ALTAREDE.radacct
where UserName ='$login'
ORDER BY RadAcctId desc
limit 1

targets.rawSql:
select 
  FramedIPAddress as IP
FROM ALTAREDE.radacct
where UserName ='$login'
ORDER BY RadAcctId desc
limit 1
